description: Curated GitHub links for AI-agent skills, skill libraries, discovery hubs, and skill management tools.

items.name: anthropics/skills
items.notes: Anthropic official public Agent Skills repository with skills, spec, and template.

items.name: vercel-labs/agent-skills
items.notes: Vercel official skill collection focused on React, Next.js, design review, and deployment.

items.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.notes: Production-grade engineering workflow skills organized around spec, plan, build, test, review, and ship.

items.name: huggingface/skills
items.notes: Hugging Face official skills for datasets, training, papers, Gradio, Hub CLI, and more.

items.name: github/awesome-copilot
items.notes: GitHub organization resource collection with agents, instructions, skills, hooks, workflows, and plugins.

items.name: block/agent-skills
items.notes: Block-maintained marketplace-style repository for reusable agent skills.

items.name: VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills
items.notes: Curated high-quality collection of official and community agent skills.

items.name: sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills
items.notes: Large installable catalog with 1400+ skills, bundles, workflows, and docs.

items.name: skillmatic-ai/awesome-agent-skills
items.notes: Curated learning and discovery resource for the Agent Skills ecosystem.

items.name: ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills
items.notes: Codex-oriented curated skills for practical workflow automation.

items.name: runkids/skillshare-hub
items.notes: Curated hub and reference template for building an internal organization catalog.

items.name: vercel-labs/skills
items.notes: Open CLI for installing and managing open Agent Skills repositories.

items.name: runkids/skillshare
items.notes: Cross-tool skill sync, audit, and management with CLI and UI.

items.name: jiweiyeah/Skills-Manager
items.notes: Desktop GUI for organizing, syncing, and sharing skills.

items.name: VikashLoomba/copilot-mcp
items.notes: VS Code extension for discovering and installing MCP resources for coding agents.

items.name: GitHub Topics: agent-skills
items.notes: Best GitHub-level entry page for the broader Agent Skills ecosystem.

items.name: GitHub Topics: codex-skills
items.notes: GitHub topic page focused on Codex-compatible skills and libraries.

items.name: GitHub Topics: claude-code-skills
items.notes: GitHub topic page focused on Claude Code-compatible skills and libraries.
